descriptionShort: Moncton Hawks defeat PEI Senators 4-1 in AHL game; Dave Tomlinson returns from Winnipeg Jets stint.
descriptionLong: The Moncton Hawks defeated the Prince Edward Island Senators 4-1 in an American Hockey League game at the Coliseum before 2,650 spectators. Hawks forward Dave Tomlinson returned to the lineup after a 23-game stint with the NHL's Winnipeg Jets. The win improves Moncton's record to 31-26-3 and solidifies their hold on second place in the Atlantic Division, trailing St. John's by eight points.

attribution.headline: Hawks solidify hold on second place
